requires: platform-owned verifier policy independent of candidate-owned tests
base commit must be an ancestor of the candidate commit
exact Unicode input integrity including accented Latin and non-Latin characters
no ordinary typing transcript scan proportional to transcript length
real background-study typing in a separate Motoko child process
background study must observe study: evidence-store
background study max character latency <= 250 ms
background typed text visible before phase completion
synthetic evidence-store artifact completes and passes integrity checks
